regimeTransitions.event: STT introduced by Finance Act 2004 (P. Chidambaram)
Zerodha launched — discount brokerage era begins
Swachh Bharat + Krishi Kalyan cess added → 15%
Stamp Duty nationalized to 0.015% on buy only
F&O STT hike (equity unchanged) - Zerodha at scale

summary.assumptions: Historical STT/stamp/GST/brokerage per cost_history.json + 0.30% slippage each side + 3yr listing + 200% momentum cap
